highlights.text: I wrote on Tuesday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins below 6699-6705.” We lost 6699 Wednesday,bears took control, and we sold to 6670s Wednesday low of day.
My general lean is we re-test 6683, then 6699 and bulls must recover that.” Bulls got to work on this, and we hit 6699 by 10am.
This squeezes occur on my core setup: The Failed Breakdown where price flushes a low, traps shorts, and recovers.

post_title: The Dip Was Bought In SPX. Can Bulls Sustain It Though? Sept 29 Plan
